title: lessingia pectinata var. pectinata
intro: Lessingia pectinata var. pectinata, also known as California bush sunflower or bush sunflower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lessingia pectinata var. pectinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable asset in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Lessingia pectinata var. pectinata can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried plant material in capsule or tincture form.
